title: Kcas TNT
description: Replace TNT with Kcas and make big boom!
body:
Replaces default TNT texture with KCAS _(1200GM)_ and changes fuse sound

![TNT Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c74588b4f2a0001f2976ba32a8d0a06cc317b74.png)

# How to install
Just move `.zip`-archive to game `resourcepacks` folder and enable texturepack in game!
